allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Initial commit: San Diego Baseball Club website

Full-stack Next.js application with:
- Public site with schedule, roster, stats, and practice pages
- Custom admin dashboard for managing games, players, seasons, practices, and team fund
- Sanity CMS integration for content management
- AI-powered stats entry from game photos
- Dark theme with custom fonts and brand colors

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix BoxScore null handling and dark theme titles

- Fix BoxScore crash when ourInnings/theirInnings are null
- Add dark prop to TwoToneTitle for dark backgrounds
- Update game detail page with dark title variants
- Clean up stat highlighting colors

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Update player card placeholder and footer styling

- Change roster placeholder circle from teal to subtle dark \(bg-white/10\)
- Remove teal border from footer top

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Redesign roster cards with horizontal layout

- New card design with orange circle accent
- Jersey number in bordered box
- Stats \(AVG, SLG, OPS\) displayed on card
- Photo overlapping orange accent circle
- 2-column responsive grid

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
